seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 10 sentences in total.
new_constraint: The email must contain at most nine sentences.
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. The email must contain exactly 10 sentences in total. The email must contain at most nine sentences.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear [Library Name] Archives Staff,

I am writing to inquire about access to your collection of archived newspapers from the year 1990. I am conducting research on a specific local event that occurred that year. Could you please let me know if you possess any editions from that time frame? If so, I would greatly appreciate information regarding the availability of these materials. Specifically, I am interested in local publications covering [mention a general topic, e.g., city politics or regional sports]. Please advise on the procedures required to view or request copies of these specific issues. Are there any associated fees for accessing the archives? I am flexible and happy to adhere to your established research protocols. Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this request. I look forward to your reply.<turn|>
